emails.subject: RE: Reinstatement of Credit Balances
emails.body: RE: Reinstatement of Credit Balances Diann What's the next step? Jim

emails.subject: RE: Reinstatement of Credit Balances
emails.body: If I don't get a response by noon today, I plan on calling Calvin.

emails.subject: RE: Reinstatement of Credit Balances
emails.body: Jim, I spoke with Janet Covington, SCE, and Calvin Yee, PG&E today. My request has been escalated to both UDC's legal and credit departments. SCE should have a response to us by the end of the week. PG&E will probably not respond until next week unless I request a more immediate response. Should I push them?
